nasb.text: Moses gave the levy which was the Lord’s offering to Eleazar the priest, just as the Lord had commanded Moses.

esv.text: And Moses gave the tribute, which was the contribution for the Lord, to Eleazar the priest, as the Lord commanded Moses.

cnv.text: 摩西照著耶和華吩咐他的，把貢物，就是耶和華的舉祭，交給以利亞撒祭司。

ccb.text: 摩西照耶和华的吩咐，把献给耶和华的举祭交给以利亚撒祭司。
